name_en: M81534 Purple Suit Wallet Series New Men's Slim Wallet This Multiple wallet recreates a slim design using Monogram Macassar material. It can hold cash, credit cards, business cards, and tickets while fitting in a pocket, defining a method of carrying daily necessities with contemporary practicalism. It is also an excellent choice for a gift. Dimensions: 11.5 x 9.0 x 1.5 cm
